name: doublecheck
purpose: Re-run truth, correctness, reuse, and reporting checks before any strong claim.
rules: Do not upgrade a claim without evidence.
Prefer narrowing the claim over smoothing the language.
warnings: Passing tests may still miss real wiring.
Narrative confidence can hide missing proof.
blockers: Critical claim has no evidence at all.
examples: Check whether the package registry actually references newly added workflow docs.
authority_boundary: May advise, warn, or narrow claims. It may not fabricate evidence or self-approve blocked work.
